name: shortcuts
description: Reusable shortcut skills for quick git publishing and Lexicon wiki lookup.

interface.shortDescription: Quick utility skills for git and wiki workflows.
interface.longDescription: Reusable shortcut skills for fast commit-and-push flows and Lexicon wiki search, reading, and browsing from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Yeet the current repo changes with a commit message.
Search the Lexicon wiki for notes about bulk enrollment.
Read a wiki article and summarize the relevant context.
